new_classes.label_en: Other Spirituous Beverage not elsewhere specified in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 90 77)
new_classes.label_de: Andere Spirituosen (anderweitig nicht genannt) in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2208 90 77)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverage falling under CN 2208 90 77: other spirituous beverages not elsewhere specified in the CN, presented in containers with a nominal volume exceeding 2 litres. This subheading is the large-container counterpart to CN 2208 90 69 (containers ≤ 2 L). See explanatory note to subheading 2208 90 56.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 2208 90 77 is minimal: it states "Other" and cross-references the explanatory note for subheading 2208 90 56. The key distinguishing criterion relative to its sibling CN 2208 90 69 is the container volume (> 2 L), which is captured via the BFO parthood restriction to LargeContainer. The substantive product definition (what qualifies as "other" spirituous beverage NES, as elaborated in the note to 2208 90 56) is already modelled in the parent class OtherSpiritousBeverageNES. Coverage is partial (0.6) because: (1) the cross-referenced explanatory note to 2208 90 56 is not reproduced here and its full product-discriminating content cannot be independently verified from this legal text alone; (2) the container threshold (> 2 L) is covered via LargeContainer; (3) no additional regulatory footnote or certificate individuals are present in the TBox to reference.
